package rulecoverage

func NegativeMapGrowthWithoutSizeHint() string {
    ruleID := "map_growth_without_size_hint"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Map insertions inside loops without a visible size hint on the initial make call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
